page: Microsoft Azure DC16ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DCadsv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 16 dedicated vCPUs paired with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For storage-intensive operations, the server includes 614 GB of local disk space and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. This configuration provides a balance of compute resources and local storage capacity without any bundled GPU accelerators. The instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio position this instance as a stable resource for workloads requiring consistent performance. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, database hosting, and workloads that benefit from local storage and premium disk capabilities.
description: Microsoft Azure DC16ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DCadsv6 family, powered by an AMD processor with an x86_64 architecture. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 16 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance is equipped with 614 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it lacks GPU acceleration and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile offers a qualitative balance of dedicated compute power and local storage capacity, making it suitable for general-purpose workloads, database hosting, and applications requiring reliable disk performance.
